outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low to moderate volatility expected due to positive GEX; dealer hedging will suppress large directional moves.
outlook.summary: Positive aggregate GEX indicates a stable, range-bound environment. Short-term bearish skew and high 0DTE Put/Call Ratio reflect strong protective hedging, anchoring structural support at 27400-27500 while Call Walls cap the upside at 28000.

levels.motivazione: Massive 0DTE Call Open Interest and Volume (119 OI / 1052 Vol) creating a stiff resistance level aligned with psychological round number.
Significant 0DTE Put Volume (2277 Vol) establishes a strong structural floor. High Put/Call Ratio confirms heavy protective positioning at this strike.
Exceptional 0DTE Put Volume (3711 Vol) indicates extreme dealer hedging activity, creating an impenetrable short-term support base.
0DTE Gamma Flip level. Spot is trading slightly below this equilibrium, indicating localized negative gamma which may increase short-term volatility and magnetic attraction.
Highest Weekly Call Open Interest (161 OI) acting as an immediate gravitational cap and resistance level directly surrounding the current spot price.
Massive Monthly Call Open Interest (3763 OI) creates a strong magnetic pull lower in a severely negative risk-reward setup for dealers if volatility expands.
